name: SunOpta Inc.
summary: PART I The Company SunOpta Inc. was organized under the laws of Canada in 1973. We deliver customized supply chain solutions and innovation for top brands, retailers, and foodservice providers across a broad portfolio of beverages, broths, and better-for-you snacks. Our plant-based beverage offerings include oat, almond, soy, coconut and rice milks, which have a favorable climate profile relative to traditional dairy milks in terms of lower carbon emissions and water usage.
